evals.prompt: Set up crawl4ai for my project
evals.expected_output: Creates crawler project directory with pyproject.toml containing crawl4ai dependency, justfile with crawl/setup-browser/example tasks, and src/crawler/quick.py template

assertions.name: justfile_has_tasks
assertions.description: justfile should contain crawl, setup-browser, and example tasks

evals.prompt: How do I crawl a site from my TypeScript app?
evals.expected_output: Explains MCP server or uvx CLI approach, provides code snippet for bun.$ integration

assertions.name: mentions_uvx_cli
assertions.description: Response should mention uvx CLI option

assertions.name: mentions_mcp_server
assertions.description: Response should mention MCP server option

assertions.name: provides_bun_example
assertions.description: Response should provide Bun/TypeScript code example

evals.prompt: Create a crawler that logs in before scraping
evals.expected_output: Generates src/crawler/auth.py with environment variable loading, BrowserContext with storage state, and login flow + crawl sequence

assertions.name: uses_environment_variables
assertions.description: Code should use environment variables for credentials

assertions.name: uses_browser_config
assertions.description: Code should use BrowserConfig with user_data_dir

assertions.name: has_login_flow
assertions.description: Code should implement login flow with JS execution

evals.expected_output: Provides shell alias or abbreviation for crawl command

assertions.name: provides_crawl_alias
assertions.description: Response should provide 'crawl' alias or abbreviation
